The [[Neuro-Saav Corporation]]s '''Cardio-Muscular Package''' was a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] package that included a [[Q-2 artificial heart]] and [[Ex-Musc enhancement]].<ref name="CRFG" />

Designed to augment a recipient's [[Heart/Legends|heart]], [[Lung/Legends|lungs]], and musculature, the cardio-muscular package combined an artificial heart with [[Rybcoarse]]-based enhancements that allowed the muscles of the body to work harder with less effort.<ref name="CRFG" /> The end result granted enhanced strength, greater endurance, faster running speed, and the ability to withstand more damage.<ref name="CRFG" />

The package often came with a significant drawback, though; often a recipient would feel invincible, and would become brash and prone to self-destructive behavior in an effort to push themselves to their absolute limits. Recipients had to be careful that they didn't fall into this behavior or risk destruction.<ref name="CRFG" />
